title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Just Herbs - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Just Herbs - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Just Herbs! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Just Herbs:
Just Herbs is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Just Herbs!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
